name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AutoPost
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear and concise description of
what the problem is. E.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope

Which part of AutoPost does this touch?

- [ ] Web dashboard (Next.js UI)
- [ ] `autopost` CLI
- [ ] Scheduler / worker (BullMQ)
- [ ] Instagram automation
- [ ] TikTok automation (web)
- [ ] TikTok Content Posting API
- [ ] Media pipeline (Sharp / FFmpeg)
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
